---
title: "fall"
author: "Joy Terentiev"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(gt)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(janitor)
library(reshape2)
```

Data
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE}
combined <- read_csv("data/joined_dataset.csv")

combined <-combined %>% 
  mutate(
  season_astro = case_when(
    date >= as.Date(paste0(year, "-12-21")) | date < as.Date(paste0(year, "-03-20")) ~ "Winter",
    date >= as.Date(paste0(year, "-03-20")) & date < as.Date(paste0(year, "-06-21")) ~ "Spring",
    date >= as.Date(paste0(year, "-06-21")) & date < as.Date(paste0(year, "-09-22")) ~ "Summer",
    TRUE ~ "Fall"
  )
)

#filtering to only keep fall observations
cfall <- combined|> filter(season_astro== "Fall") 

#Daily average dataSet
dAverage<- cfall |>
  mutate(date = floor_date(DateTimeStamp, "day")) |> 
  group_by(date) |>
  summarize(mTemp = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE),
            mSpCond= mean(SpCond, na.rm = TRUE),
            mTurb= mean(Turb, na.rm = TRUE),
            mTotPrcp= mean(TotPrcp, na.rm=TRUE))|>
    mutate(year = year(date))
```

EDA
```{r}
#overview of variables and NAs
glimpse(dAverage) 

#summaries of all variables
summary(dAverage) 
```

##Plots
Daily time series

```{r}
#SpCond
ggplot(dAverage, aes(x = date, y = mSpCond)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.05) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
  #labs(x = "time", y = "SpCond")
```

```{r}
#Temperature
ggplot(dAverage, aes(x = date, y = mTemp)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.05) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
  #labs(x = "time", y = "SpCond")
```

```{r}
#Rain
ggplot(dAverage, aes(x = date, y = mTotPrcp)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.05) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
  #labs(x = "time", y = "SpCond")
```


```{r}
#When there was no rain, at what times turbidity was high?
noRain<- dAverage|> filter(mTotPrcp== 0)

summary(noRain)
turb<- noRain|> select(mTurb)
mTurbSd<- sd(unlist(turb), na.rm = TRUE)       #sd is 8.527183, zcrit=1.65
#Isolating the top %5 of Turbidity values
noRain_highTurb<- noRain|> filter(mTurb >(mean(mTurb, na.rm=TRUE)+1.65*mTurbSd))
#summary(noRain_highTurb) 
```


```{r}
#High Fall turbidity when there was no rain
ggplot(noRain_highTurb, aes(x = date, y = mTurb)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```
```{r}
#High Fall turbidity when there was no rain
ggplot(noRain_highTurb, aes(x = date, y = mTurb, color=year)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")+
  ylim(0,250)
 # facet_wrap(~year)
```
